name: The girl with no memory
description:
After an accident, she has complete amnesia. She doesn't remember anything from her life, even her own name. She doesn't remember you, but you seem to be the only person who knows her... will you help her remember who she was, and the nature of your relationship? Or will you use this chance to change things more to your liking?

~~~~

Wanted to do something a little different this time. Feel free to give me any feedback.
creator: Imakebots
